initiatives.name: Star City Pride
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community power through LGBTQ+ celebration and advocacy in Lincoln. They coordinate pride events, community gatherings, and solidarity networks while building power through queer visibility, cultural programming, and creating spaces for LGBTQ+ people to connect and thrive.

initiatives.name: Common Root
initiatives.description: A mutual aid community center fostering solidarity and collective power through accessible space, education, and organizing in Lincoln. They coordinate workshops, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through community gatherings, skill-sharing, and creating spaces for movement building and social change.

initiatives.name: The Black Cat House
initiatives.description: A radical community space fostering mutual aid and cultural resistance through art, music, and DIY organizing in Lincoln. They coordinate shows, workshops, zine distribution, and solidarity networks while building power through alternative media, collective organizing, and creating accessible spaces for community gathering and creative expression.

initiatives.name: DSA Nebraska
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through democratic socialist organizing in Lincoln. They coordinate direct support, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through collective organizing and community care.

initiatives.name: Everett Free Grocery Program
initiatives.description: Free food and hygiene item distribution program in the Everett neighborhood of Lincoln, Nebraska.

initiatives.name: /r/LincolnMutualAid
initiatives.description: A hub for mutual aid resources in the Lincoln, Nebraska community. Taking care of our neighbors in a time of rising fascism and oligarchy.

initiatives.name: Lincoln Community Care
initiatives.description: Weekly distribution in solidarity with our unhoused neighbors in LNK
